message.content:
Explore the codebase at /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol to understand:
1. The component structure pattern (look at a few components like toast, action_panel, form)
2. How hooks are structured (look at use_toast.ts)
3. How the App.tsx wires things together
4. The types in src/types.ts
5. The existing SCSS token system (_tokens.scss)
6. How the actions dropdown works (for reference on overlay patterns)

Report back:
- File structure for a typical component
- How hooks expose functionality
- How overlays/modals are rendered (portals, z-index, animations)
- Key SCSS patterns and variables used
- How App.tsx currently handles actions and keyboard shortcuts

content.text: I'll explore the codebase to understand the component structure, hooks, App.tsx wiring, types, SCSS tokens, and overlay patterns. Let me start with a broad overview.

input.description: Get initial overview of file structure and types

content.text: Excellent! Now let me create a comprehensive report. Let me just verify a couple more patterns:
